payload.description: Unify the subprocess check primitive: port #61 group-kill semantics to verification run_check, single core/shell_runner seam, scrub SUPER_HARNESS_* on all decision-check paths (F5+F10+HG-AUTHORING-ENV)

payload.reason: Two-actor plan review converged: Codex r1 REVISE (4: spawn-failure capture matrix, tail-extraction pins, marker-style kill tests, quoted paths) + Codex r2 REVISE (2: bounded-return assert, dropped racy partial-output assert) + Claude subagent REVISE (5: F401 unused imports, ruff/mypy gates, stale module docstring, test import block, fixture nits) — all resolved, subagent final APPROVE
Two-actor code review converged to APPROVE (Codex r1 REVISE→2 fixes→r2 APPROVE clean; independent Claude reviewer APPROVE); F5+F10+HG-AUTHORING-ENV

checklist.note: Implements the F5+F10+HG-AUTHORING-ENV design exactly: one core.shell_runner primitive (killpg + bounded reap + errors=replace + env replace/inherit, never raises), both check runners reduced to wrappers, SUPER_HARNESS_* scrubbed on all decision-check paths.

Only the declared scope touched (shell_runner + the two runners + their tests + design/plan). No frozen contract (CheckResult fields, verify --json, summary.json, event payloads) changed. No tier-2 decision anchor touched (verified: no reconciled_anchors hit either runner).

Two-actor review to convergence — Codex r1 REVISE (fallback proc.kill not guarded; group-kill tests vacuous-passable) both fixed in de9181e, Codex r2 APPROVE clean; independent Claude reviewer APPROVE. Never-raises contract now locally self-evident (fallback kill wrapped, not leaning on bpo-40550).

Covered: timeout group-kill (non-vacuous handshake test), spawn-failure → fail via normal capture matrix (not a crash), non-UTF-8 output → replace (was a strict-decode crash), env scrub verified safe against all 3 armed checks (pure greps / inlined PYTHONPATH). exit_code=-1 disambiguated by timed_out/spawn_error flags before use on both wrappers.

Docstrings updated (run_check group-kill + spawn-fail + scrubbed_environ reference; CheckResult output_path spawn-fail row; stale 'baseline stubbed' fixed; check_runner module docstring). No AGENTS.md / cli-reference surface describes check env/timeout semantics — nothing to regenerate (sync --check clean).

verdict.summary: Unify the subprocess check primitive. Ports #61's process-group kill to the verification twin (was orphaning grandchildren), collapses three divergent subprocess bodies to one core.shell_runner seam, and scrubs SUPER_HARNESS_* on every decision-check path (closes HG-AUTHORING-ENV: authoring-time and merge-gate verdicts now agree by construction). 1643 tests pass; ruff / mypy / lint-imports (core-is-base KEPT) clean; self-host decision check ran clean through the new scrub. Two-actor review converged to APPROVE.
